title: theopsis lutchuensis
intro: Theopsis lutchuensis, also known as Lutchuensis or Taiwan Thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Theopsis lutchuensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Theopsis lutchuensis can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
